perspectives.name: Data Quality Skeptic
perspectives.question: Is the research built on stale data and broker narratives instead of fundamentals?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Data freshness score below 70% OR source quality score below 60% OR more than 5 unsupported narrative claims identified

perspectives.name: Contrarian Research
perspectives.question: What if the consensus view is wrong and the market moves in the opposite direction?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: All target sectors are consensus overweight OR macro thesis aligns with >80% of broker research OR no downside scenarios modeled

perspectives.name: Timeliness
perspectives.question: Is this research actionable now, or is the window already closed or not yet open?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Timing assessment is DEPLOY but capital markets are TRANSITIONAL OR cycle position is PEAK OR major regulatory change expected within 12 months

verdictReconciliation: Challenge verdict adjusts pipeline verdict confidence but does not override. If all 3 challenges trigger, reduce verdict confidence by 15-25 points. If contrarian challenge identifies a material missed risk, add to watchlist triggers.
